creator: littlesavage@orionet.ru
text:
Hi

I have reported this problem to OpenBSD team too (user/6500).
They added some checks for rtsock messages in kernel:
http://kerneltrap.org/mailarchive/openbsd-source-changes/2010/10/25/6890078
http://kerneltrap.org/mailarchive/openbsd-source-changes/2010/10/28/6890167
